runs.text: WordPress Tutorial For Beginners 2026 – Build a Website Like a Pro!

accessibilityData.label: WordPress Tutorial For Beginners 2026 – Build a Website Like a Pro! 1 hour, 13 minutes

runs.text:
WordPress Tutorial for Beginners,  Build Your First Website Easily.

Welcome! In this video, I’ll show you how to set up your very own WordPress site step by step. If you're just starting out, don't worry—I'll cover everything from installing WordPress to choosing a theme, adding essential plugins, and designing your pages. No technical jargon, just straightforward instructions to help you get online quickly.

Importan Tutorials i Mention:

WpForms tutorial:
How to make a business email:
how to link your business email with gmail:

In This Tutorial You’ll Learn in this wordpress tutorial:

-How to install WordPress and set up your hosting
-Picking and installing a theme that suits your style
-Adding plugins to extend your site’s functionality
-Building pages like your homepage, about page, and blog
-Tips to make your website secure and SEO-friendly

Timestamps

Outro

Whether you're creating a personal blog, a portfolio, or a small business website, this guide is made for you. The tutorial is updated for 2025, so you'll be working with the latest version of WordPress.

Feel free to visit my website at
wordpress tutorial for beginners, wordpress tutorial for beginners 2025, how to make a website

title.content: Elementor Theme Builder Tutorial: Design Every Page Perfectly

accessibilityContext.label: Elementor Theme Builder Tutorial: Design Every Page Perfectly 27 minutes

runs.text:
For most of my future wordpress tutorials, i do recommend to disable the atomic editor. I feel introducing this to users who want a basic website is simply not helpful and riddled with options. If you feel frustrated, dont worry the entire community agrees that V4 is the worst thing to happen to Elementor.

Elementor has shifted away from their audience for 1 reason, money. To be fair, platforms like webflow, framer and a few others generate $250+ million dollars in revenue a year while powering around 3 million websites. 

Ai reports Elementor makes around $50 million a year but powers 12+ million websites. So they handle way more customers, but dont make as much. So i can understand why Elementor has made this move. But the constant ads with Angie and other spam in the backend begging you to upgrade shows their desperation. I don't know their financials, but their moves feel desperate.

If you are wanted to give another builder a try, divi is a valuable option. I think many users now are sort of leaning towards ai because Elementor has had such a large stake in wordpress, but at this point, there really is no good solid option for beginners thats free. Good luck and let me know what you think!

runs.text:
Anyone else noticed that WPbeginner has drastically lost rankings in the last year? I rarely seen them pop up in my search results.

Also a few other names like Neil Patel, and also Adam Enfroy, it looks like they literally been wiped off Google search.

I do believe these websites got hit hard because they were buying expired domains and redirecting them, which was a common hack - but Google recently updated this algorithm, so it no longer benefits the website 

This is probably another reason why I don’t recommend people to blog in 2026. You just don’t know what’s gonna happen anymore. .

description.content: Hey, what’s going on guys—Darrel Wilson here. On this channel, I show you exactly how to build websites, make money online, and grow your business using tools like WordPress, Elementor, AI website builders, and the latest digital marketing strategies.

accessibilityContext.label: Description. Hey, what’s going on guys—Darrel Wilson here. On this ch...tap for more.

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Darrel Wilson
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Hey, what’s going on guys—Darrel Wilson here. On this channel, I show you exactly how to build websites, make money online, and grow your business using tools like WordPress, Elementor, AI website builders, and the latest digital marketing strategies. 

You’ll learn how to create professional websites with WordPress, design high-converting pages with page builders like Elementor, rank your content with modern SEO strategies, and use AI tools to automate your workflow and stay ahead of the competition. I also cover ecommerce tutorials, affiliate marketing, web hosting, and real-world strategies that I’ve personally used to generate millions online.

Topics on this channel include: WordPress tutorials for beginners, Elementor tutorials, website builders, AI website creation, SEO tips, affiliate marketing, ecommerce websites, blogging, automation tools, and online business strategies.
